programme.desc: Over a nine season spell in the Premier League, Jimmy Floyd Hasselbaink etched his name into footballing folklore as one of the most dynamic goalscorers in the competition's history. programme.desc: Aaron Ramsey was one of Arsenal’s key players for a decade under Arsene Wenger. The Welshman’s influence and technical ability made him one of the Premier League’s standout talents in midfield. He looks back on some of his highlights.
